title: calophyllum echinatum
intro: Calophyllum echinatum, also known as the echinated mahogany tree or the echinated calophyllum, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly calophyllolide, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum echinatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Calophyllum echinatum can be used to create ointments, creams, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
